body: I'm a seasoned software engineer and AI consultant with over 20 years of experience building innovative, high-impact solutions across entertainment, tech, and media. From architecting production tracking systems at Disney to developing AI-powered tools and RAG systems at AH Media, my work bridges deep technical expertise with creative problem solving. I specialize in Laravel/PHP backends, modern JavaScript frameworks, and automation platforms like n8n, with a recent focus on voice AI, digital cloning, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation. Whether leading agile teams, mentoring developers, or shipping clean, scalable code, I bring both vision and execution to every project.
